channel.title: Raspberry-Pi on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Raspberry-Pi on Arrans github.io

item.title: pikvm/pikvm
item.description: Open and inexpensive DIY IP-KVM based on Raspberry Pi

item.title: gogs/gogs
item.description: Gogs is a painless self-hosted Git service

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speaker recognition using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, C/C++, Python, Kotlin, C#, Go, NodeJS, Java, Swift, Dart, JavaScript, Flutter

item.title: shellhub-io/shellhub
item.description: 💻 Get seamless remote access to any Linux device. Centralized SSH for the edge and cloud computing

item.title: jaromaz/MacintoshPi
item.description: MacintoshPi is a project that allows running full-screen versions of Apple’s Mac OS 7, Mac OS 8 and Mac OS 9 with sound, active online connection and modem emulation under Raspberry Pi.

item.title: therecipe/qt
item.description: Qt binding for Go (Golang) with support for Windows / macOS / Linux / FreeBSD / Android / iOS / Sailfish OS / Raspberry Pi / AsteroidOS / Ubuntu Touch / JavaScript / WebAssembly

item.title: evildmp/BrachioGraph
item.description: BrachioGraph is an ultra-cheap (total cost of materials: €14) plotter that can be built with minimal skills.

item.title: GloDroid/glodroid_manifest
item.description: Android port that aims to bring both user- and developer-friendly experience in using AOSP with a set of single-board computers (SBC), phones and other devices.

item.title: russmac/python_rover_robot
item.description: A multi-threaded ultrasonic & magnetic navigating rover.
